name: Chilled Broccoli Soup with Porcini And
recipeInstructions:
Preparation of the Soup:
1. In a heavy saucepan, heat the olive oil and add the diced shallots.
2. Sweat the shallots and season with salt and pepper over medium flame until translucent.
3. Add cubed potatoes and sweat for three minutes.
4. Add chicken stock. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 1/2 hours at medium heat.
5. Remove from heat and puree using an upright blender.
6. Add blanched broccoli to the puree while blending.
7. Season, strain through a fine strainer, and serve immediately after chilling.
Preparation of the Garnish:
1. Slice Porcini mushrooms very thinly on a sharp Japanese mandoline.
2. Chop chives and add with salt, pepper, and olive oil for garnish.
Preparation of the Ricotta Toasts:
1. Dry toast bread until crispy and golden brown.
2. Cool and spread ricotta on each toast.
3. Grind white pepper over the ricotta.
4. Serve with marinated Porcini.
